cn_title: 《我的世界大电影2》正式定名，2027年7月上映
subtitle: 方块世界二周目
opus_summary: 《我的世界大电影》续集在Minecraft Live活动上正式公布片名为「A Minecraft Movie Squared」，定档2027年7月23日上映。Jack Black、Jason Momoa、Danielle Brooks等主演回归，Kirsten Dunst确认出演Alex。幕后视频展示了新西兰片场实况，Matt Berry暗示将以真人形象出镜。续集将引入北极熊等新生物。官方还宣布了Minecraft建造挑战赛，获胜者的作品将出现在电影片尾。

paragraphs.en: The cast from A Minecraft Movie 2 teamed up to release a video confirming that the sequel now has an official title: A Minecraft Movie Squared.
paragraphs.cn: 《我的世界大电影》续集的演员阵容联手发布了一段视频，确认续集正式定名为「我的世界大电影 Squared」。

paragraphs.en: The group of actors who helped bring Mojang Studios' popular sandbox game to the big screen – which included Jack Black (Steve), Jason Momoa (Garrett), Danielle Brooks (Dawn) – showed up for the Minecraft Live May 2026 event to take viewers on a trip behind the scenes of the new movie's set. It's the most we've seen from the film since it was first announced back in October 2025, but more importantly, we now know what to call it while we wait for its 2027 premiere.
paragraphs.cn: 将Mojang Studios热门沙盒游戏搬上大银幕的演员们——包括Jack Black（饰Steve）、Jason Momoa（饰Garrett）、Danielle Brooks（饰Dawn）——出席了2026年5月的我的世界 Live活动，带领观众探访新电影片场幕后。这是自2025年10月首次公布以来我们看到的最多内容，更重要的是，在等待2027年首映的同时，我们终于知道该怎么称呼它了。

paragraphs.en: Also present for today's reveal was Kirsten Dunst, who is confirmed to play Alex after previous teases. You can see the A Minecraft Movie Squared title in the image below.
paragraphs.cn: Kirsten Dunst也出席了今天的公布活动，正式确认出演Alex一角。

paragraphs.en: The video game movie's sequel was the biggest announcement from the A Minecraft Movie Squared portion of the presentation, but it was far from the only thing the cast had pulled back the curtain on. Black and Momoa opened the video with a few quick shots from the film's set in New Zealand, revealing a first look at how production is going so far.
paragraphs.cn: 续集定名是本次展示环节最大的消息，但演员们揭示的远不止这些。Black和Momoa在视频开头展示了几个新西兰片场的快速镜头，让观众首次了解制作进展。

paragraphs.en: Despite Momoa admitting that most of the behind-the-scenes details remain "top secret," the duo was quick to hand the video over to Matt Berry, who is also coming back for the sequel. They suggested that he'll appear in live-action form this time after lending his iconic voice as Nitwit in the 2025 film. Berry added that he's "not allowed to tell you who exactly" he's playing, but a joke about a shirt that "Steve would not be wearing" may contain a few clues for fans.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Momoa承认大部分幕后细节仍属「绝密」，两人很快将镜头交给了同样回归续集的Matt Berry。他们暗示Berry这次将以真人形象出镜——此前他在2025年的电影中为Nitwit配音。Berry补充说他「不能告诉你我到底演谁」，但关于一件「Steve不会穿的衬衫」的玩笑可能为粉丝提供了一些线索。

paragraphs.en: Other shots from the set show Black walking through a cave and concept art for Polar Bear mob before Brooks teased that new mobs will show up for A Minecraft Movie Squared, too. Aside from a first look at Dunst as Alex, the video left other details about the movie up to viewers' imaginations while we wait for the movie to premiere July 23, 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 其他片场画面展示了Black走过一个洞穴，以及北极熊生物的概念图，随后Brooks预告续集中还将出现新的生物。除了Dunst饰演Alex的首次亮相外，视频将其他细节留给了观众想象，我们只需等待电影于2027年7月23日首映。

paragraphs.en: Director Jared Hess and Mojang chief creative officer Jens Bergensten left viewers with the news that the developer will get fans ready for the new movie with something called the Minecraft Build Challenge. Details on the event can be found here, with prizes including the promise that finalists will be invited to an early screening of the movie, while one lucky winner will see one of their builds featured during the movie's end credits.
paragraphs.cn: 导演Jared Hess和Mojang首席创意官Jens Bergensten在最后宣布，开发商将通过「我的世界建造挑战赛」为新电影预热。入围者将受邀参加电影提前放映，而一位幸运获胜者的建筑作品将出现在电影片尾字幕中。
